message:
fix(clippy): resolve all -D warnings in frankenterm-core --tests

Fixes across 15 files:
- policy_dsl.rs: map_or(false,...) → is_some_and/is_ok_and, clone→clone_from,
  allow attrs for not() and similar_names
- policy.rs: map_or(false,...) → is_ok_and
- proptest_swarm_pipeline.rs: [x].into_iter().collect() → std::iter::once(x).collect()
- proptest_patterns.rs: same iter_on_single_items fix
- proptest_scope_watchdog.rs: needless_collect, comparison_chain
- proptest_ars_replay.rs: wildcard_in_or_patterns
- proptest_simulation.rs: tuple_array_conversions
- proptest_policy_decision_log.rs: type_complexity allow
- proptest_{beads_bridge,namespace_isolation,scope_tree,session_topology,
  storage,ars_symbolic_exec,swarm_work_queue}: minor clippy fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -511,7 +511,7 @@ proptest! {
 
     #[test]
     fn violation_categories_all_distinct(_dummy in 0..1_u32) {
-        let all = vec![
+        let all = [
             ViolationCategory::PathTraversal,
             ViolationCategory::BannedBinary,
             ViolationCategory::UnboundedDeletion,
